title: Character Blood Types
wikitext:
[]: Character Blood Types             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sat Aug 21, 2004 8:02 pm Could someone tell me all the characters blood types. IF not I am going to have to do some research. I know some of them just not all them.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Aug 21, 2004 8:12 pm if you go to www.anime-archive.net they tell you some Shinji A Rei Blue pattern Asuka O Misato A Kaoru Blue pattern

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Aug 21, 2004 9:20 pm Blood Types.... some fan sites list stuff like that, like birthdate, blood type, etc. However, the problem is that I've noticed some sites have contradictory facts, and often people just copy these without knowing where they're coming from. I'm sure there's some sort of photobook in Japanese that lists all that information, it may have been translated and thats where these details come from, but I would be scrutinizing in that they may just be bogus. I've found quite a lot of bogus information in the fan scene that is taken as truth. What do you need this info for?

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Sat Aug 21, 2004 10:17 pm I wouldn't really call pattern blue a bloodtype, it's a wavelength pattern.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Aug 22, 2004 1:45 am I am making a Powerpoint Presentation about evangelion :shock: ( Its going to take me a long time to complete it properly :cry: , but it is all worth it 8) )

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sun Aug 22, 2004 10:35 am Phaze wrote: I wouldn't really call pattern blue a bloodtype, it's a wavelength pattern.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sun Aug 22, 2004 11:53 am Awsome Timesplitter 01! When you've finished, do you think it's possible to post a link to it? I'd love to see the final version!

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sun Aug 22, 2004 11:59 am Yes! Please! I would like to see it too.

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Mon Aug 23, 2004 1:44 am Timesplitter 01 wrote: I am making a Powerpoint Presentation about evangelion :shock: ( Its going to take me a long time to complete it properly :cry: , but it is all worth it 8) )

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Aug 23, 2004 3:32 pm WTF, they actually have blood types?! :( :? :x WHY?

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Mon Aug 23, 2004 4:01 pm Over obsessive fans.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Aug 23, 2004 4:31 pm I repeat... WHY?

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Aug 23, 2004 5:53 pm Most anime characters have blood types, actually. It's supposed to say something about their characters, like the Zodiac, or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Aug 24, 2004 6:31 am I am doing it for a school project :twisted: , going to introduce it to my class :twisted: . At the moment it is average. But once I give it to you guys you can improve it of you want. Maybe I can ask eva monkey to put it up on his website when I am finished So far it is 50 slides long and only contains basic inforamtion. If I included all the info it would be over 200 slides long :shock: . Maybe I will do that one day :? . At the moment the basic structure is 1. Title page 2. Introduction 3. Characters ( 18 of them , :shock: ) 4. Organisations That is about it so far By my caluclations it should almost be 3 MB when I am finished

[]: Woah.             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Tue Aug 24, 2004 11:00 pm :shock: Now, that's dedication.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Aug 24, 2004 11:35 pm The thing is that I will probably complete it around end of January next year (200 slides)( that's if I include all the information, like what the nerv symbol means ( the tedius stuff) , etc) But as is I could probably finish it by the end of september
